title: Ubuntu build (at least) requires dependency on uidmap
body:
Installing from the launchpad PPA, buildah won't run:

$ buildah images
Error: error running newgidmap: exec: "newgidmap": executable file not
found in $PATH:
ERRO[0000] error running newgidmap: : exec: "newgidmap": executable file
not found in $PATH
ERRO[0000] (unable to determine exit status)

newgidmap is contained in the 'uidmap' package, which should be a Depends: for the buildah package, I guess.

comments.body: note the age on this; it was misfiled for a few years.  For all I know the situation is resolved.
Ok I will close, reopen if we are mistaken.
